title: Seoul Police Seek Arrest Warrant for HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk — Alleged ₩190B IPO Fraud
detail: On April 21, 2026, the Seoul Metropolitan Police Agency announced it was seeking an arrest warrant for HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk in connection with allegations of fraudulent stock trading related to HYBE's 2020 IPO. Police alleged Bang misled early investors in 2019 — telling them HYBE had no plans to go public while simultaneously encouraging them to sell their stakes to a private equity fund tied to Bang. After HYBE's IPO, the fund sold its stake and Bang allegedly received approximately 190 billion won ($129.1 million) in illicit gains. Bang has been under a travel ban since August 2025 amid a Capital Markets Act investigation. The warrant announcement, covered by Bloomberg, Variety, NBC News, and Deadline, is the most significant legal crisis in HYBE's history. Bang is the company's founder and the creative architect behind BTS's global rise. HYBE released a statement pledging full cooperation with the investigation and expressing confidence in Bang's eventual exoneration. The development emerged four days before BTS opens the North American leg of the ARIRANG World Tour at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida on April 25.

media.caption: Police seek arrest warrant for HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk over alleged ₩190B IPO fraud

title: ARIRANG Falls to No. 3 on Billboard 200 Week 4 — Highest Fourth-Week Chart Position in K-pop History; 'SWIM' at No. 10 Hot 100
detail: Billboard confirms ARIRANG fell from three consecutive No. 1 weeks to No. 3 on the Billboard 200 (chart dated April 25, 2026), earning approximately 78,000 equivalent album units in its fourth tracking week. Despite the drop, it remains BTS's highest-charting fourth week on the Billboard 200 in group history — no prior BTS album had charted above No. 5 in its fourth week. Concurrently, 'SWIM' held at No. 10 on the Billboard Hot 100 for its fourth chart week — making it BTS's longest-running top 10 Hot 100 single since 'Butter' in 2021. The week 4 data was reported by Seoul Economic Daily and STARNEWS Korea on April 20–21.

media.caption: ARIRANG holds No. 3 on Billboard 200 for its fourth chart week — best fourth-week K-pop chart position in history
